pages.text: $(bold)Your stuff is safe.$()$(br2)$(item)Corpse$() replaces vanilla item drops. When you die, your body stays where you fell, holding everything you had. Walk back, right-click, get it all back.$(br2)No more frantic five-minute scramble. No despawning piles.

$(bold)The body lasts.$()$(br2)Corpses don't despawn on a timer — they wait. Take your time getting back. Bring a friend.$(br2)$(item)Lootr$() also gives every player their own copy of dungeon loot, so one server mate looting a chest doesn't empty it for everyone else. Death and discovery both got gentler.
